title: 3Powers git-integration preferences (git.yaml)
description: Tunes the run's git handling only: the dedicated run branch name, the base branch, and the 3pwr commit-author identity. Never a gate, verdict, or ledger input; it cannot disable a guard.

branch_prefix.description: Prefix of every run's dedicated branch (branch is <prefix><NNN>-<slug>).

base_branch.description: The branch a fresh run's branch is created off (falls back to the current commit when it does not resolve).

author.description: Author identity for commits 3pwr itself creates (applied per commit; the developer's own git config is never mutated).
